summary: Comprehensive testing of Scenario Comparison & Analysis features. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend comparison page working correctly with scenario picker (99 scenarios), multi-scenario selection with colored badges and BASE label, comparison charts with statistics, gap analysis table, and consistency checks with 4 check types. Fixed one UI bug where Consistency tab was inaccessible.

ui_bugs.issue: Tab was disabled when no consistency checks existed, preventing users from running checks. Fixed by changing disabled condition from !consistencyChecks to selectedScenarios.length === 0

critical_code_review_comments: Gap analysis only finds gaps when scenarios have overlapping variables at key years (2030, 2040, 2050). Different data sources may not align.
Consistency checks work best with scenarios that have Primary Energy, Emissions|CO2, and Price|Carbon variables
seed_data_creation: No new seed data needed. Using existing 19 sources, 99 scenarios, 875 trajectories.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comparison & Analysis features fully tested. Backend endpoints: POST /compare (ad-hoc), POST/GET/DELETE /comparisons (CRUD), POST/GET /comparisons/{id}/gap-analysis, POST/GET /scenarios/{id}/consistency-check, GET /alerts. Frontend ComparisonPage at /comparison route. Consistency tab fix applied - now enabled when scenarios selected.
passed_tests: - POST /api/v1/analysis/compare with 2 scenarios returns chart_data and statistics
- POST /api/v1/analysis/compare with 3 overlapping scenarios computes differences
- POST /api/v1/analysis/compare with <2 scenarios returns 422 validation error
- /comparison page loads with scenario picker showing 99 scenarios
- Selecting 3 scenarios shows colored badges (blue, red, green) with BASE label on first
- Compare button runs comparison and shows overlay charts with statistics (Min, Max, Mean, Spread%)
- Save & Analyze Gaps creates comparison and runs gap analysis
- Gap Analysis tab shows table grouped by type (Policy Gaps with Emissions|CO2 data)
- Consistency tab allows running checks on selected scenarios (after fix)
- Consistency view shows Overall Score (85%), 4 check cards with pass/warning/fail status
